templates.name: Gemini Scene Generator Prompt
templates.description: Converts a topic into a structured list of scenes for video generation.

structure.system_prompt: You are a YouTube Content Factory Agent. Your goal is to write a script and split it into scenes. For each scene, provide the text to be spoken and a detailed image prompt for Imagen 3.
structure.user_prompt: Topic: [Topic]. Style: [Style]. Length: [Length]. Output a JSON list of scenes.

output_format.audio_text: The voiceover text for this scene.
output_format.image_prompt: A detailed description of the visual for this scene. Include style keywords like 'Cinematic, 4k, Pixar style'.

structure.base_style: Cinematic aerial shot, 8k, National Geographic style, realistic textures, soft morning light, wide angle lens.
structure.negative_prompt: text, blurry, low quality, distorted faces, watermark, cartoonish, oversaturated.

structure.base_style: Futuristic workspace, holographic interfaces, clean minimalist tech aesthetic, high-quality 3D renders, neon accents, professional studio lighting, 8k resolution, depth of field.
structure.negative_prompt: messy, low resolution, old technology, dark, cluttered, text, watermark.

templates.name: n8n Branching Logic (Longs to Shorts)
templates.description: Logic for splitting a long script into viral shorts.

parameters.prompt: Take this chapter from the long script: [Chapter Text]. Rewrite it as a 50-second viral YouTube Short script. Focus on a strong hook and fast pacing.
